response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document references a future Federal Register citation (February 2026) that does not exist, invents a specific CFR section (40 CFR §120.4) and rule number with no basis in actual EPA rulemaking, and the substance—allowing filling of wetlands up to 1 acre with no Corps notification—is inconsistent with longstanding Clean Water Act regulatory frameworks and post-Sackett policy developments.
